meta.title: Magic Library — A Grimoire for your desktop
meta.description: Three AI agents collaborate to write your novel — world-building, drafting, and editing while you sip your tea.

hero.title: Magic Library
hero.tagline: Three AI agents collaborating to write your novel — world-building, drafting, and editing while you sip your tea.
hero.caption: ✦ Grimoire · LORE · WRITER · CRITIC

agents.title: The Keeper, the Scribe, and the Editor
agents.subtitle: Each is a specialist. Together, they are a workshop.

lore.name: The Keeper
lore.desc: Remembers every detail of your world, characters, and rules — keeping continuity across chapters.

writer.name: The Scribe
writer.desc: Drafts chapter by chapter from your story plan — in the style and direction you choose.

critic.name: The Editor
critic.desc: Reviews each chapter with a piercing eye — scores it and points out what to refine.

tools.title: Everything you need, every step of the way
tools.subtitle: From outline to delivery, all in one place.

plan.name: Story Plan
plan.desc: Outline the narrative, break it into acts and beats, with status and ordering.

world.name: World KB
world.desc: Build entities for characters, places, factions, and artifacts — with relationships between them.

dock.name: Arcane Dock
dock.desc: Chat with any agent via a slide-in dock on every page — never lose context.

ingest.name: Ingest
ingest.desc: Import .docx / .pdf — let AI extract characters and lore into your world automatically.

export.name: Export
export.desc: Export to Markdown, PDF, or eBook — per chapter or compiled as a tome.

chat.name: Chat
chat.desc: Talk to WRITER in real time — ask to continue, expand, or summarize.

schedules.name: Schedules
schedules.desc: Set a cron schedule for autonomous writing — hourly, daily, or weekly.

rubric.name: Critic Rubric
rubric.desc: A 5-dimension rubric — lore, character voice, plot, prose, continuity.

pipeline.title: One click. A new chapter.
pipeline.subtitle: LORE preps → WRITER drafts → CRITIC scores → if it passes, the chapter is saved.

prep.name: LORE prep
prep.desc: Reviews the last chapter, builds writer guidelines, summarizes the story so far.

write.name: WRITER drafts
write.desc: Drafts a new chapter from the plan, using tools to search the world and previous chapters.

review.name: CRITIC reviews
review.desc: Scores 0–10 across 5 dimensions. Must hit 7+ to pass.

cron.title: Scheduled runs
cron.desc: Cron-based scheduler — write every hour, every day, or every week.

loop.title: Loop until it passes
loop.desc: If CRITIC rejects, WRITER rewrites based on the feedback, up to 3 times.

budget.title: Time-bounded
budget.desc: Hard 35-minute ceiling — no run ever pins your machine overnight.

gallery.title: See it in action
gallery.subtitle: Every page is designed to work with the others — open one and see the whole picture.

cta.title: Ready to write your first novel?
cta.desc: Free download. Bring your own API key — or wait for Nexus integration to buy credits in-app.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Shaman Technology · Made with ✦ for writers
